architecture.summary: Single GitHub API call to plugins/ dir, no retry. discoverUnregisteredPlugins() in marketplace.ts diffs Contents API response against marketplace.json entries.

integrations.summary: Reuses existing GitHub Contents API and submitSkill() from api/client.ts. No new external integrations.

ui-ux.summary: Yellow label in picker for unregistered plugins, header with registered/unregistered counts, --force gate with warning and re-submission offer.

performance.summary: N/A - single additional API call, best-effort, no perf impact.

security.summary: Tier-1 local scan still runs for --force installs. UNSCANNED lockfile tier refers to platform-level Tier-2 only. --force overrides Tier-1 failures as existing behavior.

edge-cases.summary: Filter to directories only. Name matching by dir name against plugin name fields. Only applies when marketplace.json exists with entries. --plugin <name> still requires --force for unregistered. --force suppresses re-submission prompt.
